summary_text: 1. Clearly safe to include for this MBP `/kernel` `/vote` launcher fix - [scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/install-kernel-launchers.sh) - [tests/test-install-kernel-launchers.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-install-kernel-launchers.sh) (new file) - [tests/test-kernel-launcher.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-launcher.sh) - [scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh) - [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md) 2. Risky / mixed files (do not bundle blindly) - [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md) - [.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml) Why they are risky: both diffs include broader kernel runtime / operational content that is not tightly coupled to the MBP launcher install path (e.g., 4-pane narrative + prompt path changes in README; additional kernel runtime file trigger sets and new runtime test jobs in workflow). 3. Recommended next action - Commit only the 5 files above as a minimal, low-risk deliverable for the MBP launcher fix. - Leave `README.md` and `.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml` out of this commit unless you intentionally want to land those broader kernel-runtime/4-pane changes too. - If needed, we should perform a separate cleanup pass for README/workflow by diffing against a clean upstream target and re-applying only the MBP-specific lines, then commit those in a second, explicit docs/CI-only commit.
